text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please use one of the documented mirrors in the handbook. There are 
plenty of mirrors to choose from. Beyond that the ticket is not helpful 
because you mis vital information "Where, what, how". Closing the 
ticket. You can find the handbook here: 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/eresources.html
